pi_items.source: task.json description: 'Create a Product Attribute named Color (id: color) with values: Black, White, Navy.'
task.json description: 'Create a Product Attribute named Size (id: size) with values: S, M, L, XL.'
task.json description: 'Create a Product Variation Type named Apparel (id: apparel)'
task.json description: 'Create a Product Type named Apparel (id: apparel)'
task.json description: 'Create a published product titled Urban Electronics Logo Tee'
task.json description: 'Add at least 4 variations to this product'

privileged_info_summary: The task setup_apparel_product_type@1 is a Drupal Commerce configuration task where agents must create an 'Apparel' product type with Color attribute (Black, White, Navy) and Size attribute (S, M, L, XL), create an Apparel variation type linking both attributes, and create a product titled 'Urban Electronics Logo Tee' with at least 4 variations priced at $24.99 each. All metadata values in task.json match the explicit requirements stated in the task description.
